title: How to watch New Zealand vs Ireland: Free Streams & TV Channels for Nations Championship 2026
summary: You can use a VPN to watch New Zealand vs Ireland for free as if you were right at home. New Zealand vs Ireland is free-to-air on Virgin Media One in Ireland, with live streaming available via the Virgin Media Play platform.
